polls.text: Did you read the presented document?
Please vote "YES" if you favor "BPM" as the name of the joint working group name. If you believe this name should not be chosen, vote "NO" and speak up with the reason why not.
Please vote "YES" if you favor "BIPP" as the name of the joint working group name. If you believe this name should not be chosen, vote "NO" and speak up with the reason why not.
Please vote "YES" if you favor "BMPM" as the name of the joint working group name. If you believe this name should not be chosen, vote "NO" and speak up with the reason why not.
Please vote "YES" if you favor "NETMEASURE" as the name of the joint working group name. If you believe this name should not be chosen, vote "NO" and speak up with the reason why not.
Please vote "YES" if you favor "BPMP" as the name of the joint working group name. If you believe this name should not be chosen, vote "NO" and speak up with the reason why not.

chat.author: Thomas Graf
chat.text: appologies, the link in the chairs slides on note taking is wrong. Correct is https://notes.ietf.org/notes-ietf-126-ippm?edit

chat.author: Giuseppe Fioccola
chat.text: Here is the GitHub repo for the RFC7799bis: https://github.com/giuseppefioccola/draft-fioccola-ippm-rfc7799bis

chat.author: Robert Raszuk
chat.text: @meetecho I tried already 3 local ISPs, but meetecho the streem is disconnecting every few minutes and reconnecting shortly.

chat.author: Lorenzo Miniero
chat.text: @Robert Raszuk are you using a VPN by any chance that could interfere with the traffic?

chat.author: Robert Raszuk
chat.text: @lorenzo Nope ... no VPN - native IPv4 with zero local congestion. And Mon & Tue it was working fine.

chat.author: Lorenzo Miniero
chat.text: Have you tried if the same happens with a different browser? It shouldn't make a difference (we support them all), but sometimes it can help, e.g., if a browser is stuck in a weird state in between updates

chat.author: Robert Raszuk
chat.text:
Well I did not ... but it is very random. In this ippm session happened about 5-6 times  
Error is: Can not connect to media server then after 10 sec it reconnects. 
Not a big problem - but look perhaps in the media server log

chat.author: Thomas Graf
chat.text: We are looking for further reviews and feedback on the proposed joint charter: https://github.com/ietf-ippm/wg-charter/blob/main/ippm-bmwg-joint.md
